classObjective: Graph the image of a figure after a reflection over a given line on the coordinate plane.
workedExamples: 13-1, Example 1 — Graph the Image of a Figure Under a Reflection Over the x-axis
13-1, Example 2 — Graph the Image of a Figure Under a Reflection Over the y-axis or y=x
warmUp: What are the coordinates of (3, 5) reflected across the x-axis?
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: coordinate rules for reflection in x-axis, y-axis, y=x, vertical lines; reflection in horizontal lines
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice graphing reflections of figures over various lines
independentPractice: Practice problems graphing images of figures after reflections
assessment: Exit ticket: reflect triangle with vertices (1,2), (3,4), (5,1) over the line x = 3
capReflection: How do the coordinate rules for reflection help you verify that your graphed image is correct?
